description_long: This object is a thick, rectangular cut of steak with a browned, slightly textured exterior and a deep red, marbled interior. The steak appears to be partially sliced, with two pieces cut from one end, revealing the rich, raw interior and the distribution of white fat marbling throughout the meat. The outer surface is dry and slightly rough, with a natural, uneven coloration ranging from tan to brown. The interior is a vibrant, moist red with visible streaks of white fat, indicating a fresh, uncooked state. There are no visible grill marks, bones, or garnishes present. The steak is solid and dense, typical of a high-quality cut of beef, and would likely be found in a butcher shop, restaurant, or food market within an urban environment.
description: A thick, rectangular steak with a browned exterior and a richly marbled, deep red interior, partially sliced to reveal its fresh, uncooked state.
description_view_0: The steak is shown with two slices cut from the main piece, clearly displaying the marbled red interior and the browned outer surface.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the browned, slightly rough exterior and shows the two cut slices extending from one end.
description_view_2: The focus is on the cut face of the steak, highlighting the deep red, marbled interior and the thickness of the cut.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the main body of the steak with the two slices separated, again revealing the marbled interior and browned exterior.
attribute_grill_marks: No grill marks are visible on the steak; the surface is uniformly browned without any distinct patterns.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: Moderate fat marbling is visible, with streaks of white fat evenly distributed throughout the interior.
